role: Test suite enforcing architectural boundaries and module contracts within the ArchSpine system.
responsibility: These tests collectively validate CLI help text contracts, module boundary compliance for view components, and write access isolation via the SpineWriterBoundary, ensuring the system remains modular and secure.

children.role: Automated test suite that verifies the help text contract for CLI commands, ensuring that `spine sync` help directs users to `spine build` for baseline rebuilds and that general help contains expected usage line.
Vitest test file validating the module boundary of view-related components under src/services/view.
Unit/integration test suite for the SpineWriterBoundary module, verifying write access protection and output isolation.
